query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, total_rows, error_message, 
       FROM_UNIXTIME(started_at/1000) as started_at,
       FROM_UNIXTIME(finished_at/1000) as finished_at
FROM sync_logs 
WHERE section='Boonphone' 
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
